marketing.hero.title: Never Miss a Detail
marketing.hero.subtitle: AI that listens so you don't have to take notes. Record, transcribe, and extract actionable insights from every conversation you have.
marketing.pricing.title: Simple pricing
marketing.footer.tagline: Your AI personal assistant. Capture, analyze, and organize every conversation.
marketing.cta.title: Ready to Transform
marketing.cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who never miss a detail. Start recording for free today.
marketing.cta.beta_note: No credit card required. Free during public beta.
marketing.about.hero_subtitle: We are building the AI assistant that captures every conversation, turning spoken words into organized, actionable knowledge.
marketing.about.story_p1: It started with a simple problem:
marketing.about.story_p2: We realized that millions of brilliant ideas, critical decisions, and action items were being lost every day in the chaos of conversations. Notebooks get lost, memories fade, and manual transcription is a chore that no one enjoys.
marketing.about.story_p3_prefix: OmniListen was born from the desire to capture that value. We wanted to build a personal AI assistant that didn't just record audio, but actually
marketing.about.story_p3_suffix: it—giving you back the context and clarity you need to move forward.
marketing.about.values_subtitle: These principles guide every decision we make, from product features to how we handle your data.
marketing.about.value1_body: Your conversations are sacred. We design our systems to ensure your data remains private, secure, and under your control.
marketing.about.value2_body: We don't build features for the sake of technology. We build them to solve real human problems and make your work life happier.
marketing.about.value3_body: The world of AI is moving fast, and so are we. We are constantly pushing the boundaries of what's possible in audio intelligence.
marketing.contact.title: Contact Us
marketing.contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Please reach out with any questions or feedback.
marketing.contact.email_subtitle: Our friendly team is here to help.
marketing.contact.office_subtitle: Come say hello at our office HQ.
marketing.pricing.page_subtitle: We are finalizing our plans. For now, enjoy full access during our public beta.
marketing.features.subtitle: Replace your notebook with an intelligent assistant that remembers everything and organizes it for you.
marketing.features.hero1_desc: Capture every word with 99% accuracy using advanced AI speech recognition. Works across accents, jargon, and multiple speakers.
marketing.features.hero1_detail: Powered by custom-trained models optimized for natural conversation — not generic speech-to-text.
marketing.features.hero2_desc: Ask anything about your conversations and get cited answers instantly. Search across all your transcripts with natural language.
marketing.features.hero2_detail: Every answer links back to the exact moment in the recording, so you can verify and share context.
marketing.features.core1_desc: Deadlines and events detected from any conversation, pushed straight to Google Calendar.
marketing.features.core2_desc: Action items pulled from your conversations and organized so nothing slips through.
marketing.features.core3_desc: Track speaker time, sentiment, and key topics across every conversation automatically.
marketing.features.support1_desc: Know who said what with automatic speaker diarization across every conversation.
marketing.features.support2_desc: Transcribe conversations in English and Arabic with full accuracy and context.
marketing.features.support3_desc: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. SOC 2 compliant infrastructure.
marketing.how_it_works.title: How It Works
marketing.how_it_works.subtitle: Three steps. Zero effort. All your conversations, organized.
marketing.how_it_works.step1_desc: Start recording any conversation in one click. Works with any audio source, any device.
marketing.how_it_works.step2_desc: AI transcribes, identifies speakers, extracts tasks, events, and key takeaways in real time.
marketing.how_it_works.step3_desc: Tasks and events are pushed to your calendar and dashboard. Search any conversation, anytime.
marketing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
marketing.faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about OmniListen.
marketing.faq.a1: OmniListen is your AI personal assistant that listens, transcribes, and extracts actionable insights from any conversation. It automatically identifies tasks, events, decisions, and key notes, then syncs them to your calendar and dashboard.
marketing.faq.a2: Our AI achieves 99% transcription accuracy in optimal conditions using Gemini 2.0 Flash. Accuracy remains high even with background noise, accents, and technical jargon.
marketing.faq.q3: Does it work with my calendar?
marketing.faq.a3: Yes. OmniListen integrates directly with Google Calendar. Events and deadlines detected in your conversations are automatically pushed to your calendar with full context.
marketing.faq.a4: Absolutely. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We follow industry best practices for data security and privacy. Your recordings and transcripts are accessible only to you.
marketing.faq.a5: Currently, OmniListen supports English and Arabic with full transcription and analysis capabilities. We are working on adding more languages.
marketing.faq.a6: Yes. During our public beta, all features are completely free with no limits on recordings or transcription. No credit card required to get started.
marketing.pricing_teaser.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
marketing.pricing_teaser.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need to.
marketing.pricing_teaser.tier1_desc: Full access during beta. No credit card required.
marketing.pricing_teaser.tier2_desc: For growing teams that need more.
marketing.testimonials.title: Loved by Teams
marketing.testimonials.subtitle: See what people are saying about OmniListen.
marketing.testimonials.t1_quote: OmniListen changed how I handle conversations. I used to lose track of action items constantly. Now everything is captured and synced automatically.
marketing.testimonials.t2_quote: The transcription accuracy is incredible, even with heavy accents and technical jargon. We switched from Otter and never looked back.
marketing.testimonials.t3_quote: I have 6-8 conversations a day. Having every decision, task, and deadline automatically extracted saves me at least an hour of manual note-taking.
marketing.security.hero_subtitle: We built OmniListen with a security-first architecture. Your conversation data is sensitive, and protecting it is the foundation of our business.
marketing.security.encryption_body: Data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 standards and in transit via TLS 1.3. Your audio files and transcripts are stored in secure buckets with strict access logging.
marketing.security.infrastructure_body: We host our infrastructure on Google Cloud Platform (GCP), leveraging their world-class data centers with SOC 2, ISO 27001, and HIPAA compliance accreditations.
marketing.security.ai_privacy_body: Your conversation data is processed by our AI partners (Google Gemini) under strict enterprise agreements. We do NOT use your data to train our public models, nor do we allow our AI partners to do so.
marketing.security.access_body: We follow the Principle of Least Privilege. Only authorized engineers with 2FA enabled have access to production environments for maintenance purposes, and all access is logged.
marketing.security.reporting_body: If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in OmniListen, please report it to us immediately. We operate a responsible disclosure program.
